rules.chainTemplate: Because you absorbed your father's lessons, the Manhattan deal felt inevitable.
Because you branded yourself with The Art of the Deal, fame came knocking.
Because you bet on Atlantic City casinos, the bankruptcy reckoning loomed larger.
Because The Apprentice made you a household name, the political stage opened up.
Because you forged the MAGA base, the 2016 run caught fire.
Because you built an unbreakable loyalty machine, the comeback was unstoppable.
Because you consolidated power at home, the world stage beckoned.
Because you played nuclear brinkmanship, the Exchange became all but certain.
Because you funded life-extension science, immortality moved within reach.
Because you sealed the pact with Musk, the Martian groundbreaking arrived.
